# zendesk_ticket_form (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk ticket form by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the ticket form. Provide either id or name.
- `name` (String) The name of the ticket form. Provide either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean)
- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean)
- `display_name` (String)
- `end_user_visible` (Boolean)
- `in_all_brands` (Boolean)
- `position` (Number)
- `ticket_field_ids` (List of Number)
- `updated_at` (String)
